procedure:
Use this procedure for any new customer request that requires initial acknowledgment and prioritization.

Acknowledge the customer's request
Suggested reply:

"Hi {{ticket.requester.first_name}},

Thanks for reaching out — we've received your request and are reviewing it now. We'll take a look and get back to you as soon as we can.

If you have any additional details or screenshots that might help, feel free to reply to this ticket.

Best,

{{agent.first_name}}"

Update the ticket priority to High.

Update the ticket status to In Progress.
